classObjective: Identify and name points, lines, and planes from geometric figures.
workedExamples: 10-2, Example 1 — Identify Lines, Planes, and Relationships from a Figure
10-2, Example 2 — Model Real-World Objects with Geometric Terms
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: vocabulary of undefined terms; naming conventions; collinear/coplanar relationships
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice identifying and naming geometric figures from diagrams
independentPractice: Practice problems identifying points, lines, planes, and their relationships in figures
assessment: Exit ticket: identify all collinear points and name a set of coplanar points from a given figure
capReflection: Why are points, lines, and planes called undefined terms in geometry?
